title: Timeline / roadmap report
description: Data contract for the timeline-roadmap format: a horizontal gantt-style planner with a time axis, swimlane rows, gantt bars, milestone diamonds, go/no-go gates, a today marker, and optional phase-band overlays. The reader scans left-to-right as a delivery schedule. Renders to a self-contained, themeable, interactive HTML planner canvas. The sample's #report-data is a valid instance of this schema.

meta.description: Shared report chrome (org / project / title / theme). Brand-neutral: use real or brand-neutral values (e.g. Independent Research / Open Research / Research Desk); never leave a {{...}} placeholder.

reportType.description: Eyebrow label above the title, e.g. 'Platform delivery roadmap'.

title.description: Main roadmap title, e.g. 'GEN2 Core Banking Platform — Delivery Roadmap'.

subtitle.description: Optional standfirst line, e.g. 'FY26–FY27 programme plan across 5 workstreams'.

date.description: ISO date this roadmap was produced (YYYY-MM-DD).

theme.description: Initial brand theme; applied as <html data-theme>. Default for this format is 'indigo'.

periods.description: The ordered time-axis columns (left to right), e.g. quarters or sprints. Column index 1 = first period. 4–8 periods is the comfortable range.

key.description: Stable unique period key used in `bars`, `milestones`, `gates`, and `today`. e.g. 'q1-fy26'.

label.description: Primary display label shown on the time-axis tick, e.g. 'Q1 FY26'.

sublabel.description: Optional secondary label shown below the primary, e.g. 'Apr–Jun'.

swimlanes.description: The workstream / team rows, rendered as horizontal tracks. Each swimlane spans the full time axis.

id.description: Stable unique lane ID used in `bars` and `milestones`. e.g. 'platform', 'data', 'security'.

name.description: Workstream display name shown in the sticky left lane rail, e.g. 'Platform Core'.

owner.description: Optional owner/team name shown as a small meta line under the lane name, e.g. 'K. Nakamura'.

index.description: Optional short index label for the lane chip, e.g. 'L1'. If omitted, rendered sequentially.

icon.description: Optional icon category hint for the lane head icon. One of: 'process', 'time', 'status', 'people', or a free-form string matching a house icon key.

bars.description: The gantt bars placed in the grid. Each bar belongs to a swimlane and spans one or more periods.

lane.description: ID of the swimlane this bar sits in. Must match a `swimlanes[].id`.

startPeriod.description: Period key where this bar starts (inclusive). Must match a `periods[].key`.

endPeriod.description: Period key where this bar ends (inclusive). Must match a `periods[].key`.

label.description: Bar label text shown inside the gantt bar, e.g. 'Core ledger build'.

status.description: Bar semantic state. 'ok' = on track (brand colour); 'risk' = at risk (bordeaux); 'hold' = watch/delayed (amber); 'planned' = future ghost bar (dashed, not started).

progress.description: Optional completion percentage 0–100, rendered as a tinted progress sliver inside the bar.

solid.description: If true, this is a key-path bar rendered with a filled solid brand colour rather than a tinted fill. Use for the most important delivery track.

row.description: Optional row index (1 or 2) for stacking two bars on the same lane track (dual-track mode). Defaults to 1.

milestones.description: Diamond markers placed on a period column edge in a swimlane, with a short caption.

lane.description: Swimlane ID where the milestone sits. Must match a `swimlanes[].id`.

period.description: Period key this milestone is attached to. The diamond sits at the end edge of this period. Must match a `periods[].key`.

label.description: Short caption next to the diamond, e.g. 'GA core' or 'Data freeze'.

status.description: Milestone state. 'ok' = on track (brand diamond); 'risk' = at risk (bordeaux); 'hold' = watch (amber).

atEnd.description: If true, diamond is positioned at the end (right edge) of the period cell rather than the start. Default false.

row.description: Optional row index (1 or 2) for placement on a dual-track lane. Defaults to 1.

gates.description: Go/no-go gate markers — rendered as hollow diamond variants (.milestone--gate) in the gate-table ledger below the canvas.

period.description: Period key (approx. date) of this gate. Used to populate the target column in the gate ledger.

targetDate.description: Precise ISO target date (YYYY-MM-DD) shown in the gate-table, e.g. '2026-12-15'.

label.description: Gate name shown in the ledger, e.g. 'Security audit gate'.

sublabel.description: Optional one-line context note shown under the gate name, e.g. 'External pen-test sign-off — release blocker'.

lane.description: Swimlane ID owning this gate, shown as a chip in the ledger, e.g. 'security'.

dependency.description: Optional dependency note shown in the ledger, e.g. 'Pen-test remediation'.

status.description: Gate decision state shown as an .st-badge in the ledger. 'ok' = Passed / On track; 'risk' = At risk / Pending; 'hold' = Conditional / Planned.

statusLabel.description: Display text for the status badge, e.g. 'Passed', 'At risk', 'Conditional'. Overrides the default derived from status if provided.

today.description: Position of the 'today' vertical line on the canvas. Specifies which period column it falls in and a fractional offset within that period.

period.description: Period key of the column containing today. Must match a `periods[].key`.

fraction.description: Fractional position within the period column, 0.0 = start of column, 1.0 = end. e.g. 0.6 for 60% through the period.

phases.description: Optional phase-band overlay strips shown below the lane grid, grouping periods into named programme phases (e.g. Discovery / Build / Harden / Launch).

startPeriod.description: Period key where this phase begins. Must match a `periods[].key`.

endPeriod.description: Period key where this phase ends (inclusive). Must match a `periods[].key`.

name.description: Phase display name shown in the band, e.g. 'Build'.

sublabel.description: Optional period range label shown below the name, e.g. 'Q2–Q3 FY26'.

alt.description: If true, render with the alternate (muted) phase band style. Alternate phases typically follow brand-tinted ones.

meta.title: GEN2 Core Banking Platform — Delivery Roadmap
